Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Mon: %pet told me the food yesterday was really yummy. Now I kinda want to taste it too...
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Tue: I like eating yummy ore!#$b#Papa showed me a few fresh ones! Bars are too much for me...but papa knows how to chip a piece off for me!
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Wed: Heyhey! Do you think if I try to command the tide like papa I can make the water rise?
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Thu: I ran around the farm today!#$b#It is always fun to look at all the things!#$#But I also like going to the beach! I wanna collect shells, please!
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Fri: I asked papa to lift me up and throw me into the air.#$b#I could see the whole town!$1
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Sat: Hm, frog eggs, frogs....oh!$3#$b#I have collected quite a few amphibians but...papa said to let them go again unless I am willing to fully take care of them.#$b#I listened of course...he didn't say I can't catch more though.
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Sun: Can we go to the beach?#$b#I wanna show you how good I can swim already!
Marinus.Toddler.Gift.Loved: Gasp! For me?#$b#Yayyy, I love it, thank you soooo much!!
Marinus.Toddler.Gift.Dislike: Mhm...I don't know what to do with this...
Marinus.Toddler.Gift.Hated: Yuck!#$b#What did I do to you...?$2
Marinus.Movie.With_Parent_Before: I can't wait to see the movie!
Marinus.Movie.With_Parent_Script: %He seems really engaged in the movie, clutching your hand.
Marinus.Movie.With_Parent_After: Wow...#$b#I really enjoyed watching this with you!
Marinus.Movie.love_Before: Yes, yes!! I can't wait to watch it!
Marinus.Movie.like_After: I liked it!#$b#Thank you for bringing me.
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.1: I'm sleepy...$3#$#...can I go nap a bit?
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.2: Hm...papa said that I can't take a bite out of your pickaxe because you need it...
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.3: Bark doesn't taste good...I like ore more.#$b#Do you have some to snack on for me?
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.4: ...$3#$b#...oh! I thought about collecting sea shells!
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.5: Auntie Conny gave me some pearls to play with!#$b#Can I go with papa to pet the ferrets?
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.6: I ran around the town today!#$b#The other kids couldn't keep up with me, hehehe!$1
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.7: %kid1 told me that I can swim up a waterfall if I try hard enough!#$b#I asked papa but he said I need to be a bit older before I can try it.
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.8: Hey, hey! Can %kid1 and I go to the mountains today?#$b#I wanna talk to the dwarf!
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.9: I love our home!$1#$b#There's so much to do and I love running around and climb up the trees!
Marinus.Toddler.Dialog.Farmhouse.10: The forest is fun to play around in!#$b#I saw a purple guy the other day.
Marinus.Festivals.spring13: I prefer an amethyst over an egg...but this looks fun!#$b#Can you get me a pruple egg?
Marinus.Festivals.spring24: Dancing looks fun! Papa said he will show me how to do it so I can dance too!
Marinus.Festivals.summer11: Food! Beach!#$b#What if we add some iridium ore? Hm, something purple...
Marinus.Festivals.summer28: I love jellies! They're fun to talk to and always have something interesting to share.
Marinus.Festivals.fall16: The fair! can we get some plushie? I wanna try out everything.
Marinus.Festivals.winter8: It's so cold...but it's fun!#$b#I wanna build a snowman!
Marinus.Festivals.winter25: This is nice. There's so many gifts!#$b#Papa said we can have some special ore as a treat today!
